summary:
## Wiki Lint Complete

The wiki is in excellent health. Here's what was verified:

**Pass 1 — Structural Integrity:** ✓
- 218 content pages verified (6 topics + 27 sources + 3 timelines + 134 entities + 48 ideas)
- All index.md entries match actual files
- Zero broken wikilinks
- No companies or people improperly in entities/ (all are technical artifacts)

**Pass 2 — Wrong & Duplicate Information:** ✓
- Zero duplicate pages
- All topic pages have Evolution and Patterns & Insights sections
- All frontmatter valid and consistent
- No stale claims

**Pass 3 — Connection Quality:** ✓
- Zero bare "Related:", "See also:", or unannotated links
- All entity and idea pages have Connections sections

**Pass 4 — Index & Log:** ✓
- Updated index.md `Last updated` to 2026-05-18
- Added lint entry to log.md

The wiki is well-maintained — no significant issues found. Previous lints have already addressed the common problems.
